Performed well, only stopped because MTIs shutoff over the holiday.

MTIs shut off, cell was still running stable. Calendered (70C). Noise in the first cycle makes the FCE unreliable.

Shorted
Baseline testing with Super P and MWCNTs. | Tracking: uncal, 1.2M LiFSI 3:7, 2% VC

Baseline testing with Super P and MWCNTs. This test had to be repeated several times due to protocol errors, and Biologic cycler malfunction. The electrode was tested with several difference electrolytes. First set of tests (N5a, N5b, N5c) had mistakenly put discharge first. Additionally, the use of variables post formation with the wrong sign, resulted in charging during a supposed discharge step, resulting in overpotential. | Tracking: uncal, 2M LiFSI, 0.2M LiDFOB 3:7
Protocol Issue
N5a came from a series of tests. Testing the effects of different electrolytes on an NMC811. NMC811 from MSE supplies utilized. An error was noted in the protocol causing discharge first instead of charge as well as overpotential after formation.
